title: Nunnezia fragrans
taxonomy: Nunnezia fragrans is a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae. The Nunnezia fragrans genus consists of two species, both of which are native to the Mediterranean region. The species are often classified as perennial herbs with small, white flowers and a sweet fragrance. They are commonly found in dry, rocky areas and are valued for their ornamental and medicinal properties. The classification of Nunnezia fragrans reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Boraginaceae family.
